memoryArtifacts.headline: "Llyfr Baglan: Or The Book of Baglan," by Sir Joseph Alfred Bradney, Page 251

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Biography
Name
Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed of Powys. Boyer notes that "While "late authorities" accord him a distinguished pedigree, the very name Gwerystan could be a derivative of the English "Werestan".

Marriage
Gwerystan's wife is unknown. While Boyer shows Gwerystan having married Nest ferch Cadell ap Brochwel. Stewart Baldwin comments that it is late sources that make Gwerystaqn's wife to be Nest, daughter of Cadell ap Brochwel, king of Powys. Baldwin notes this is chronologically impossible," estimating Gwewrystan's birth as 970, while Nest ferch Cadell ap Brochwell lived 200 years earlier.

Death
Gwerystan died 1005 in Wales

Issue
Children, listed by Bartrum
1.) possible daughter, married Caradog ap Gwyn ap Gollwyn ab Ednywain N.N. verch Gwerystan; 

2.) Nest Verch Gwerystan (976-1005), m. llywarch Gam ap lluddica ap Tudur Trefor Most sources show a daughter marrying Llywarch Gam ap lluddica, and sources showing the daughter's name as Nest do not show it as lleicu or Lleucu, or vice versa. Therefore it appears that the two aqre the same person. Lleicu ferch Gwerystan, born Wales 1004. Lleucu verch Gwerystan;

3.) Cynfyn ap Gwerystan, (Interim) King of Powys born 978 in Powys and died 1023 in Powys.. Cynfyn, m. Angharad ferch Maredudd Cynfyn ap Gwerystan, Arglwydd of Cwybr

4.) Elinor ferch Gwerystan, born Powys 980. Elinor, m. Cadell ab Einion ab Owain ap Hywell Dda Elinor verch Gwerystan; 

5.) Ithel Ap Gwerystan Ithel. Ithel Ap Gwerystan

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent於大約0954年出生在威爾士時，他的父親Gwaithfoed ap Gwynnan35歲，母親Morfydd Ddu ferch Ynyr37歲。他於大約0973年與Nesta ferch Cadell在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1035年在英國威爾斯波斯享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent于大约0954年出生在威尔士时，他的父亲Gwaithfoed ap Gwynnan35岁，母亲Morfydd Ddu ferch Ynyr37岁。他于大约0973年与Nesta ferch Cadell在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他去世于1035年在英国威尔斯波斯享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

en.lifeSummary: When Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent was born about 0954, in Wales, his father, Gwaithfoed ap Gwynnan, was 35 and his mother, Morfydd Ddu ferch Ynyr, was 37. He married Nesta ferch Cadell about 0973, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 9 daughters. He died in 1035, in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent est né environ 0954, à Galles, son père, Gwaithfoed ap Gwynnan, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Morfydd Ddu ferch Ynyr, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Nesta ferch Cadell environ 0973, à Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 9 filles. Il est décédé en 1035, à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent um 0954 in Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gwaithfoed ap Gwynnan 35 und seine Mutter Morfydd Ddu ferch Ynyr 37. Er hat um 0973 in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom Nesta ferch Cadell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Er starb 1035 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent è nato il circa 0954 nel Galles, il suo padre, Gwaithfoed ap Gwynnan, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Morfydd Ddu ferch Ynyr, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Nesta ferch Cadell circa 0973, nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 9 figlie. Morì nel 1035, nel Powys, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwentが約0954年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Gwaithfoed ap Gwynnanは35歳，母Morfydd Ddu ferch Ynyrは37歳であった。約0973年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアでNesta ferch Cadellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1035年にイギリスウェールズポウイスで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent(이)가 대략 0954년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gwaithfoed ap Gwynnan(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Morfydd Ddu ferch Ynyr(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 0973년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 Nesta ferch Cadell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1035년 영국 웨일스 파우이스에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent nasceu aproximadamente 0954, em Gales, seu pai, Gwaithfoed ap Gwynnan, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Morfydd Ddu ferch Ynyr, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Nesta ferch Cadell aproximadamente 0973, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1035, em Powys, Gales, United Kingdom, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent родился около 0954 г. в местности Уэльс, его отцу по имени Gwaithfoed ap Gwynnan было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Morfydd Ddu ferch Ynyr, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Nesta ferch Cadell около 0973 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Он умер в 1035 г. в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent nació aproximadamente 0954, en Gales, su papá, Gwaithfoed ap Gwynnan, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Morfydd Ddu ferch Ynyr, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Nesta ferch Cadell aproximadamente 0973, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió en 1035, en Powys, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 82 años.
